DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Continued To Apr-19-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the court's own motion to April 19, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, due to the parties' failure to adequately meet and confer regarding the issues raised by the demurrer as required by CCP 430.41. This should give the parties sufficient time to agree to a resolution which precludes the court from having to rule on the same issue that the court has previously ruled. The court is at a loss to understand why plaintiff's counsel continues to include the same deficient language in the complaints they have filed in this county after the court has previously ruled that the language is deficient. (See demurrer order in Petree v. Ford, case number 553491 memorializing the oral ruling made at the hearing on November 16, 2016). The parties are wasting each other's and the court's time by filing and opposing demurrers on the same grounds that the court has previously ruled. Please refrain from doing so in the future. Counsel for the plaintiff is again admonished that the Local Rules require that courtesy copies of all filed papers must be submitted to department 302. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Continued To Apr-19-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT as to portions of the complaint is continued on the court's own motion to April 19, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to be heard concurrently with the demurrer filed by Ford. Counsel for the plaintiff is again admonished that the Local Rules require that courtesy copies of all filed papers must be submitted to department 302. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
